violations.text: Knife observed stored between prep table and prep unit.PIC moved to warewashing area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1.wok stations 2.walk in coolers 3.prep units 4.storage shelves(above 3bay sink) 5.grease trap areas The non food contact should be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

The floors throughout the facility(including walk in cooler) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

The (walls and ceiling) in the (bathroom) area is in poor repair. Observed damage ceiling tiles and holes in walls. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

Working containers of (dry ingredients and spices ) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
Inspector food being stored in non grade food bags in walk in coolers and freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
(1 Dr Reach In Freezer ) located in the (kitchen ) area was not in good repair.Observed an accumulation of ice buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1.prep table shelves 2.walk in cooler shelves 3.hot hold units 4.wok station 5.prep units 6.food storage bins New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The floors throughout the facility(including walk in cooler) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment, items, and clutter were observed in the (kitchen, front counter, and bathroom) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The (walls and ceilings ) in the (bathroom) area is in poor repair.Observed a hole and damaged/missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

Raw animal foods (whole shell eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (sauces) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
Onions and buckets of sauces were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the kitchen under 3-bay sink and bathroom do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. PIC stated coving is ordered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by several utensils and a space heater. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cooked chicken) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

Chicken was observed thawing in the 3-bay sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The presence of rodents and roaches is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings throughout the establishment and a live roach observed during inspection. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
Buckets of sauce were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

Bowls are being used as scoops in various containers of dry goods. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following areas have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, rodent droppings and other debris: -prep table -prep unit -sinks -cook surfaces Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
The hand sink in the kitchen was observed with a clog. The faucets at the cookline and the drains at the 3-bay sink were observed with leaks. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
The hand sink in the restroom was not cleaned as evidenced by rodent dropping around faucet. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed throughout the establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The walls in restroom and under 3-bay sink are in poor repair. Gnawing and large openings 0bserved. Ceiling panel observed missing near retail counter. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a table and rice cooker. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Items removed during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as noodles) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Foods rearranged during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the wok station and refrigeration units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
